ns0:entry.ns0:title: Mbed-TLS/mbedtls
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Mbed-TLS/mbedtls
Language: c
An open source, portable, easy to use, readable and flexible TLS library, and reference implementation of the PSA Cryptography API. Releases are on a varying cadence, typically around 3 - 6 months between releases.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: RT-Thread/rt-thread
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/RT-Thread/rt-thread
Language: c
RT-Thread is an open source IoT Real-Time Operating System (RTOS). https://rt-thread.github.io/rt-thread/

ns0:entry.ns0:title: arendst/Tasmota
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/arendst/Tasmota
Language: c
Alternative firmware for ESP8266 and ESP32 based devices with easy configuration using webUI, OTA updates, automation using timers or rules, expandability and entirely local control over MQTT, HTTP, Serial or KNX. Full documentation at

ns0:entry.ns0:title: curl/curl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/curl/curl
Language: c
A command line tool and library for transferring data with URL syntax, supporting DICT, FILE, FTP, FTPS, GOPHER, GOPHERS, HTTP, HTTPS, IMAP, IMAPS, LDAP, LDAPS, MQTT, MQTTS, POP3, POP3S, RTSP, SCP, SFTP, SMB, SMBS, SMTP, SMTPS, TELNET, TFTP, WS and WSS. libcurl offers a myriad of powerful features

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ducalex/retro-go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ducalex/retro-go
Language: c
Retro emulation for the ODROID-GO and other ESP32 devices

ns0:entry.ns0:title: espressif/esp-claw
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/espressif/esp-claw
Language: c
ESP-Claw, a "Chat Coding" AI agent framework for IoT devices

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebook/zstd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebook/zstd
Language: c
Zstandard - Fast real-time compression algorithm

ns0:entry.ns0:title: git/git
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/git/git
Language: c
Git Source Code Mirror - This is a publish-only repository but pull requests can be turned into patches to the mailing list via GitGitGadget (https://gitgitgadget.github.io/). Please follow Documentation/SubmittingPatches procedure for any of your improvements.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: glfw/glfw
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/glfw/glfw
Language: c
A multi-platform library for OpenGL, OpenGL ES, Vulkan, window and input

ns0:entry.ns0:title: libsdl-org/SDL
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/libsdl-org/SDL
Language: c
Simple DirectMedia Layer

ns0:entry.ns0:title: libuv/libuv
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/libuv/libuv
Language: c
Cross-platform asynchronous I/O

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lvgl/lvgl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lvgl/lvgl
Language: c
Embedded graphics library to create beautiful UIs for any MCU, MPU and display type.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nginx/nginx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nginx/nginx
Language: c
The official NGINX Open Source repository.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nothings/stb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nothings/stb
Language: c
stb single-file public domain libraries for C/C++

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openssl/openssl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openssl/openssl
Language: c
General purpose TLS and crypto library

ns0:entry.ns0:title: polhenarejos/pico-fido
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/polhenarejos/pico-fido
Language: c
FIDO Passkey for Raspberry Pico and ESP32

ns0:entry.ns0:title: redis/hiredis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/redis/hiredis
Language: c
Minimalistic C client for Redis >= 1.2

ns0:entry.ns0:title: systemd/systemd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/systemd/systemd
Language: c
The systemd System and Service Manager

ns0:entry.ns0:title: xiaojieonly/Ehviewer_CN_SXJ
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/xiaojieonly/Ehviewer_CN_SXJ
Language: c
ehviewer，用爱发电，快乐前行

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr
Language: c
Primary Git Repository for the Zephyr Project. Zephyr is a new generation, scalable, optimized, secure RTOS for multiple hardware architectures.
